title: Daman、Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Daman、Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Daman是Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu的一个城市，人口约200,000。A coastal union territory on the Arabian Sea, known for its Portuguese colonial heritage, beaches, and as a popular weekend getaway.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
